tasks.name: Finalize paper draft with all results integrated
tasks.description: Complete paper writing: integrate all H1-H8 results, H10 random baseline, rate-distortion framing, and methodological contributions. Paper already has outline and partial draft in writing/.

tasks.name: Generate all paper figures from experimental data
tasks.description: Generate Figures 1-6 from experimental data: absorption distribution, steering correlation, precision-recall, inhibition graph, random SAE comparison. Data exists in exp/results/pilots/ and exp/results/full/

visualizations.description: Random SAE vs trained SAE absorption

tasks.name: Compile LaTeX paper to PDF
tasks.description: Compile the LaTeX paper to PDF. Verify all figures are included, bibliography builds, and document compiles without errors.

tasks.name: Integrate literature review with paper citations
tasks.description: Review literature.md and integrate key citations into paper. Ensure all claims are backed by references. Update bibliography if needed.

tasks.name: Internal review and revision cycle
tasks.description: Run internal review: check for consistency, verify all figures are referenced, ensure methodology section is complete, check that H6 falsification is clearly explained.

notes: All main experiments are COMPLETED. Remaining work is paper writing, figure generation, and review. The key insight from H10 (random > trained absorption) should be prominently featured as metric validation. Focus is on completing the paper, not running new experiments.
